title: Cyathea tryoniana
taxonomy: Cyathea tryoniana is classified within the family Cyatheaceae, which is a group of tree ferns. This species belongs to the genus Cyathea, which is a large and diverse group of tree ferns native to tropical and subtropical regions. The genus Cyathea is part of the order Cyatheales, a group of vascular plants that are characterized by their tree-like growth habit. The order Cyatheales is a subset of the class Polypodiopsida, which is a group of ferns and their allies. This classification is based on the plant's morphology, anatomy, and phylogenetic relationships.
